name: King Copper Discovery Corp.
description: King Copper Discovery Corp. is a Canada-based exploration company focused on the Colquemayo gold-copper project in Southern Peru. The company holds an option to earn a 100% interest in the road-accessible project, which covers 6,600 hectares. The site features copper-gold-silver mineralization within high-sulphidation epithermal systems, hosted by phreatomagmatic and hydrothermal breccias emplaced into Miocene to Pliocene andesitic volcanic rocks. Extensive hydrothermal alteration has been mapped across a significant area of the property, highlighting its potential for mineral discovery.
